title: ESTHER-RP-001: Centered Agency Under Persistent Uncertainty
description:
Public preprint and bounded executable research package on centered agency under persistent uncertainty. The package defines a governed causal-history architecture, selective operational commitment, obligation and evidence lifecycle, substrate interaction boundaries, sealed measurement contracts, reproducibility evidence, and open external-review protocols.

The release does not claim consciousness, life, personhood, AGI, entity status, empirical continuity, production security, or quantum/photonic necessity.
notes: DOI is pending publication. Use the version-specific DOI after Zenodo ingestion. Scientific content is v0.8; v0.8.1 is the independently reproduced Windows-runner packaging correction. Documentation is CC BY 4.0; code remains available under the MIT License included in the package.
